title: Marketing Manager for Chinese and Western Medicine Wholesale Compan
description:
Job Advertisement: Marketing Manager for Wholesale Company

Position: Marketing Manager

Industry:Pharmaceutical Wholesale & Chinese Medicine Wholesale

About Us:

Ferragold Singapore a leading Chinese and Western wholesale company based in Singapore, specializing in both Chinese and Western medicine. Our mission is to provide quality medicinal products to an extensive range of clients, including pharmacies, traditional medicine shops, and clinics. We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Marketing Manager to further expand our presence in the Western medical and pharmacy markets while maintaining strong relations with our existing clientele, such as TCM stores and clinics.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies to penetrate and expand into Western medicine and pharmacy markets.

- Build and foster strong relationships with new clients, leveraging industry knowledge and contacts.

- Maintain and enhance relationships with existing customers, including Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) shops and clinics.

- Collaborate with the sales team to align marketing strategies with sales goals.

- Conduct market research to identify trends, customer needs, and competitive landscape.

- Create compelling marketing materials and campaigns to strengthen brand presence and customer engagement.

- Organize and attend industry events, workshops, and networking activities.

Qualifications:

- Minimum of 5 years of marketing experience in the pharmaceutical or healthcare industry.

- Proven track record in developing successful marketing strategies and campaigns.

- Strong network and relationships within the Western medical and pharmacy sectors.

- Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with both Western and Traditional Chinese Medicine markets is a plus.

What We Offer:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Opportunity to be a part of a dynamic team and make a significant impact on growth.

- Professional development opportunities.

- A supportive and collaborative work environment.

How to Apply:

If you are a results-driven marketing professional with a passion for the pharmaceutical industry, we would love to hear from you. Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience and why you are the right fit for this position to admin@ferragold.com.


Join us in our journey to bridge Eastern and Western medicine for a healthier world!
